CustomField.description: Formula image field. Green flag when nepa_last_synced__c is populated (live agency API data current). Red flag when null (only locally-cached permit status is available). Surfaces the API degradation state visually — coordinator sees amber/stale state without needing to parse a timestamp field. Designed for the nepaPermitDependencies view in the demo.
CustomField.formula: IF(ISBLANK(nepa_last_synced__c), IMAGE("/img/samples/flag_red.gif", "Agency API Unavailable — Cached Status Only", 16, 16) & " Cached Only", IMAGE("/img/samples/flag_green.gif", "Live — Synced " & TEXT(DATEVALUE(nepa_last_synced__c)), 16, 16) & " Live" )
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Green = permit status confirmed via live agency API. Red = no live sync; displaying last cached status. Check nepa_last_synced__c for timestamp.
CustomField.label: Agency Sync Status
